subject: Fermi  trigger No 752990530: Global MASTER-Net observations report
submitter: Vladimir Lipunov at Moscow State U/Krylov Obs <lipunov@xray.sai.msu.ru>
body:
V.Lipunov, E.Gorbovskoy, N.Tiurina,  P.Balanutsa, , D.Vlasenko, I.Panchenko,
A.Kuznetsov,  G.Antipov,  A.Sankovich, A.Sosnovskij, Yu.Tselik, M.Gulyaev, Ya.Kechin,

C.Francile,  F. Podesta, R.Podesta, E. Gonzalez  (Observatorio Astronomico Felix Aguilar (OAFA),

A. Gabovich, V.Yurkov (Blagoveschensk Educational StateUniversity)

R.Rebolo (The Instituto de Astrofisica de Canarias),
L.Carrasco, J.R.Valdes, V.Chavushyan, V.M.Patino Alvarez, J.Martinez,
A.R.Corella, L.H.Rodriguez (INAOE, Guillermo Haro Astrophysics Observatory) 

MASTER-OAFA robotic telescope  (Global MASTER-Net: http://observ.pereplet.ru, Lipunov et al., 2010, Advances in Astronomy, vol. 2010, 30L)  located in Argentina (OAFA observatory of San Juan National University) started inspect of the Fermi GRB241111.17 (trigger No 752990530,14h 21m 24.00s , -43d 13m 58.8s, R=34.92) errorbox  12593 sec after notice time and 12627 sec after trigger time at 2024-11-11 07:32:32 UT, with upper limit up to  18.0 mag. The observations began at zenith distance = 68 deg. The sun  altitude  is -22.8 deg. 

The galactic latitude b = 16 deg., longitude l = 320 deg.


Real time updated cover map and OT discovered available here: 
https://master.sai.msu.ru/site/master2/observ.php?id=2665525

We obtain a following upper limits.
